g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the watchdog file detection work in main.py?')
sendPrompt('What does read_excel() do and what is the column mapping?')
sendPrompt('How does get_browser_agent() choose between Selenium and Playwright?')

g.text: No name or SIREN? → status = SKIP

g.text: Regex on raw AI text response

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Gemini GEO RAG fallback work in process_row?')
g.text: Gemini RAG fallback (if no phone yet)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the agent phone query and why is it a separate search?')
